title: leucophyta citrea
intro: Leucophyta citrea is a species of flowering plant in the family Compositae, commonly known as the 'tree daisy'. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Leucophyta citrea include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as providing relief from fever and digestive issues. Leucophyta citrea is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and can also be used in capsule or tincture form to harness its medicinal properties.
